name: Dual Gun
short_description: 《Dual Gun》is a survival horror first-person shooter game,set in a world infested with various mutated creatures. You are a member of the military skilled with dual pistols. You are dropped into these locations, and your mission is simple: survive long enough to clear out the mutated beings!
detailed_description:
• Slow-motion effects allow players to better witness the moments when monsters are killed with headshots.

  • Single-player mode for offline play.

  • A variety of different monster types.

  • Good news for shotgun enthusiasts, with a variety of shotguns to choose from: pump-action shotguns, double-barreled shotguns, triple-barreled shotguns, fully automatic shotguns, and more.

  • For shotgun enthusiasts, with a variety of shotguns to choose from: pump-action shotguns, double-barreled shotguns, triple-barreled shotguns, fully automatic shotguns, and more.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Korean
